pollIntervalHelp: Too frequent polling may cause HTTP 403 errors from the Grohe API. Recommended: 300s or higher. On errors the interval increases automatically (up to 1h) and resets after a successful poll.
notifyHint: Enable notifications and select the desired providers. The adapter automatically detects running instances – no instance number required.
notifyOnAlarmsLabel: 1 – Critical alerts (flooding, sensor errors, system errors)
notifyOnWarningsLabel: 2 – Warnings (battery, temperature/humidity, WiFi loss, Blue filter/CO₂ low)
notifyOnControlLabel: 3 – Valve & control events (valve changes, device online/offline, water dispense)
